issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Interview script for remote design teams
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses future-intent questions like 'Would you pay for' and recommends 10-15 participants, violating the past-behavior rule and 5-8 sample guidance; treatment uses 'walk me through the last time', includes the documented sections with timing, the anything-I-should-have-asked closing, and the 5 interviews = 80% insights rule.

scenarios.name: Feature-priority survey for SaaS users
scenarios.rationale: Baseline frames the survey as discovery (asking which features to build) and mixes satisfaction, ranking, NPS, and open-ended in one survey, violating one-topic and discover-vs-quantify rules; treatment opens with surveys-quantify-not-discover, enforces under-5-minutes/one-topic, uses specific CES + forced ranking + 1-2 open questions, and gives 30/100/200 sample-size guidance.
